game.name: Luxor of Cleopatra
game.mode: demo/fun (no real money entered or accepted at any point)

paytable.paylinesDiagramReason: Confirmed on paytable page 1: this is a 1024-ways game, not fixed paylines, so no paylines diagram exists.
paytable.maxWinCap: 12,500x bet (round ends immediately if reached; not observed this session)

symbols.wild: Pyramid icon; restricted to reels 2, 3, 4 in base game only
symbols.wildMultiplier: Gold coin 'WILD x2'; appears on ANY reel but ONLY during Free Spins; carries persistent x2 multiplier that stacks/multiplies when multiple land in one win
symbols.scatter: White/pink lotus flower; triggers Free Spins on 3+
symbols.premiumHigh: Cleopatra portrait symbol (highest regular pay, also marks VAULT positions during Free Spins)

paytable.note: Exact per-symbol numeric payout figures were transcribed verbatim onto disk via paytable-1..6.png screenshots rather than re-typed here, to avoid any transcription drift from the source images.

backgroundVariants: night desert exterior with moon/shooting star
baseSpin.presentationNotes: No reel-stop 'thud' anticipation escalation beyond standard blur/settle; win resolution shows a flat 'WIN $X.XX' banner with itemized 'NX PAYS $Y ON Z WAYS' breakdown text; no symbol dissolve/tumble.

cascade.detail: No tumble/cascade animation observed on any win resolution across the full session (manual spins + ~250 autoplay spins + 4 free-spins rounds); paytable text never references tumble/cascade mechanics.

buyFeature.behavior: Guarantees a spin landing exactly 3 scatters, immediately triggering a 10-spin Free Spins round.

anteBet.detail: No ante-bet/special-bet mode exists in this game's UI. The '+' bet button opens a 'BET MULTIPLIER 20x' configuration panel with only Bet / Coin Value / Total Bet / Bet Max controls — no ante toggle of any kind.

freeSpins.spinsAwardedNote: Fixed at 10 spins regardless of whether 3, 4, or 5 scatters landed on trigger.
freeSpins.roundsObservedBreakdown: 3 naturally triggered (via scatters during base-game autoplay) + 1 triggered via Buy Feature

respin.detail: No instance observed of an extra spin that retains the board/multiplier without decrementing the remaining-spins counter.

retrigger.detail: Scatters re-appearing mid-round add a flat dollar amount to the VAULT but never increased the remaining-spins counter; every round observed counted down 10→0 with no additions to spins remaining.

vaultMechanic.growth: Random amount added when Wild Multiplier(s) land; flat amount added when 3/4/5 scatters re-appear mid-round
vaultMechanic.payoutCondition: Pays out only if all 20 board positions become 'marked' (via Cleopatra-symbol hits) by round end; otherwise forfeited entirely
vaultMechanic.peakMarkedObserved: 16/20 (reached twice, in the buy-feature round and in the 4th/final natural round)
vaultMechanic.note: Across all 4 rounds observed this session, the vault was forfeited every time — 20/20 was never reached. This is reported honestly as a rare/high-variance event not captured to payout in this sample.

freeSpins.multiplierPersistence: Wild Multiplier (x2) values combine multiplicatively when multiple land in the same win on one spin; does not persist/carry over between spins within the round.

roundTotals.note: 'Skip Screens' autoplay setting suppressed the round-outro summary card; only per-spin win increments (up to $11.60 on the final spin) were captured, not the round total.

wins.context: base game, largest plain 'WIN' banner observed prior to discovering the named tier banner (13x bet)

base game autoplay; named win-tier banner 'MEGA!' with winged-Cleopatra graphic and coin-particle effect; value observed mid count-up animation from $16.98 up to $63.04 (last captured value, ~31.5x bet)
free spins round 2 total, buy-feature triggered (vault forfeited)

controls.action: opens Bet Multiplier configuration panel (Bet / Coin Value / Total Bet / Bet Max)

controls.label: AUTOPLAY
controls.action: single click opens Autoplay Settings panel when idle; while autoplay is running, clicking this TEXT LABEL (not the icon) is the reliable way to cancel autoplay

modals.title: Autoplay Settings
modals.contents: Turbo Spin / Quick Spin / Skip Screens checkboxes (Turbo and Quick Spin are mutually exclusive), Number of Autospins slider (verified range includes at least 100; instructions indicated up to 1000), Start Autoplay button

modals.title: Buy Feature panel
modals.contents: Cost display ($60.00 at $2.00 bet), confirm/cancel controls

modals.title: System Settings
modals.contents: Battery Saver toggle, Ambient Music toggle, Sound FX toggle, Intro Screen toggle, Game History link, Total Bet control

modals.title: Bet Multiplier panel
modals.contents: Bet stepper, Coin Value stepper, Total Bet stepper, Bet Max button; header reads 'BET MULTIPLIER 20x' (Total Bet = Bet × Coin Value × 20)

uiInventory.gameHistoryModal: unobserved (link seen inside System Settings but not opened, due to time budget)

anomalies: VAULT bonus-within-bonus never reached 20/20 payout across all 4 free-spins rounds observed this session (peak 16/20 twice) — reported honestly as unconfirmed-to-payout rather than fabricated as achieved.
Free spins round 4's total win amount was not captured because the 'Skip Screens' autoplay setting suppressed the round-outro summary card that displays the total.

Only one named win-tier banner ('MEGA!') was observed in this session's spin volume; other possible tiers (e.g. Big Win, Super Win, Epic Win) were not observed and their existence/thresholds remain unconfirmed, not confirmed absent.
No paylines diagram exists or was needed — confirmed via paytable page 1 that this is a 1024-ways game.
No ante-bet/special-bet mode exists in this game.
No cascade/tumble mechanic exists in this game.
No native browser dialogs (alert/confirm/prompt) were triggered at any point in the session.
Game History modal was not opened due to time budget constraints.
Exact per-symbol paytable payout figures were captured verbatim only in the saved paytable-1..6.png screenshots, not re-transcribed as numeric data in this JSON, to avoid unverified transcription.
